name: Fujian Foxit Software Development Joint Stock Co.,Ltd
summary: Fujian Foxit Software Development Joint Stock Co.,Ltd develops PDF electronic document solutions worldwide. The company offers various solutions covering the document life cycle, such as document generation, conversion, display, editing, search, printing, storage, signature, form, protection, and secure distribution management, as well as PDF software development kits and cloud solutions. It serves customers in government and e-government, publishing education library, financial, manufacturing, IT communication, energy and chemical, food and medicine, and law firm sectors. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Fuzhou, China.
